chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-707 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objection. For hearing of case. 19.12.2025 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad and SIP Muhammad Saleh PS Sakhipir Hyderabad. Mr. Sajjad Ali Zounr advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.7, taken on record. Statement and compliance report filed on behalf of respondent No.3 and 4 are taken on record. Respondent No.7 present along with alleged detainee minor Imdad, who is aged about 2 1⁄2 years old. As an interim arrangement, the custody of minor has been handed over to the petitioner. However, both the parties are set at liberty to approach before the Guardian and Wards Court concerned for permanent custody of the minor. Instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
